prattville_al.bio: Independent broker specializing in term life and mortgage protection for families. Helps clients navigate impaired-risk underwriting (diabetes, smoker, family history) by shopping multiple carriers to find the best rate class.

Focused on whole life and final expense for seniors and pre-retirees. Holds the LUTCF designation and works extensively with families planning for end-of-life expenses, legacy gifts, and burial coverage.

Veteran-owned agency. Specializes in IUL and whole life for high-net-worth individuals, business owners, and key-person coverage. CLU and ChFC designations. Works closely with estate planning attorneys.
